items.name: Homemade Wings
items.description: Click to equip- double jump to take flight! You'll soar over ROBLOX with your own homemade wings. Birds got nothin' on you, son!

items.name: ROBLOXIAN Healing Orb
items.description: Heal yourself with this glowing green orb.  No need to heal right now?  Drop healing orbs around a game and pick them up as needed. Why green?  Everyone knows that green is the color of healing...duh.

items.name: Silver Speedster Convertible
items.description: I mean, I could drive 55. I just don’t want to.

items.name: Ice Axe
items.description: Defend the igloos at any price!

items.name: Knights of RedCliff: Battle Horn
items.description: Blow thy horn and blast thy foes as the noble RedCliff Eagles swarm unto the battlefield doing justice to thy goals.

items.name: Giant Ape Arms
items.description: Equip this gear to get gorilla-like arms. Clicking makes you punch, and any  player you hit with your fists will feel the wrath of the ape king!

items.name: DarkAge Shuriken
items.description: Click to throw two of these powerful weapons swirling towards your foes.  Anyone hit is dealt 22 damage per shuriken.

items.name: Poison Picnic
items.description: This green cake with a skull on it is irresistible.  Does 60 damage to any opponent who picks it up.  Why would they pick it up you say?  Because they have no other choice.

items.name: Steampunk Steam Gun
items.description: Shoot burning hot steam at your enemies! Click and hold to release steam in the direction of your cursor. The more steam that hits your foes, the more damage you'll do!

items.name: Champion Egg Beater Sword
items.description: Used to slay a magical dragon of old. This sword increases the chance of egg drops in PvP mode of the 2016 Eggventure. Click to swing the eggbeater and swipe them with it. While you swing, the eggbeater spins in a circular motion. Does 14 damage per hit.

items.name: First Aid Kit
items.description: It was hard, but you graduated college with a 4.2 GPA and got into a decent med school. Then you slogged through 4 more years of memorizing random facts. THEN you slaved away through 4 years of residency. THEN you got drafted by the army and make $45,000 a year. NOW you run around like mad, flinging medkits at your team mates just trying not to get shot. Yes. Law school was the right choice. You owned yourself.

items.name: Tiny Pony Stampede
items.description: Summon upon a stampede of ponies to charge at your enemies with lethal force!  Click and drag to summon the ponies and indicate their starting point and running direction.

items.name: Staff of Gloomy Grip
items.description: One click and a gloomy hand does your bidding. Tip - Try grabbing something with the staff and then walking!

items.name: Zebra Laser Gun
items.description: Rapidly fire both a black and white laser to do 5 damage to anyone you hit.  In addition to doing damage, you'll also turn your opponent black and white (depending on which laser he is hit with).

items.name: Spinning Robot Helmet
items.description: Your head is spinning! And it's unstoppable! Click to toggle the front light on and off.

items.name: Bunny Ninja Master Sai
items.description: The great bunny ninja masters could slice very quickly, as well as hop great distances through the air. They could even channel powerful bunny bombs to fling their enemies far from them.

items.name: Golden Sword of Spring Growth
items.description: Spring is here and gold is best. Best your foes by slashing them or by spawning a deadly field of protective poisonous flowers.  Click to slash and do 30-35 damage per hit. Press 'Q' to  spawn a deadly field of white, blue, gold, and violet flowers around you, preventing your enemies from coming up to you. Anyone that attempts to enter the field of flowers will be massively damaged every second they're in it.

items.name: Chupacabra
items.description: You've captured the mystical chupacabra and now he does your bidding.   He still disappears on occasion, but when you click, he will attack your foes.  If you click another character, the chupacabra will attack it until it dies.

items.name: Jungle Guitar
items.description: Great for jamming in the jungle or making rhythms in the rainforest.

items.name: Ram Mount
items.description: Ride across the rugged terrain on this sure-footed ram mount. He might be stubborn, but his horns always get the point across.
